---
title: "Pheast_JDM"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading

```{r}
library(zellkonverter)
library(SingleCellExperiment)

New_sce <- readH5AD(
  "~/0d2b3fc4-9f4b-4b29-8451-6d6c388ba015.h5ad",
  use_hdf5 = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
New_sce
assayNames(New_sce)
colnames(colData(New_sce))
```

### **FILTERING**

```{r}
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$development_stage)))
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$disease_group)))
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$case_control)))
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$disease)))
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$tissue)))
sort(unique(as.character(colData(New_sce)$orig.ident)))

```

```{r}
meta_new <- colData(New_sce)

age_num <- suppressWarnings(
  as.numeric(sub("-year-old stage", "", meta_new$development_stage))
)

New_ped_healthy_blood <- New_sce[
  ,
  !is.na(age_num) &
  age_num < 18 &
  meta_new$case_control == "HC" &
  meta_new$disease_group == "HC" &
  meta_new$disease == "normal" &
  meta_new$tissue == "blood"
]
```

```{r}
cat("Total cell count after filtering:", ncol(New_ped_healthy_blood), "\n")
cat("Total number of donors after filtering:", length(unique(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$donor_id)), "\n")
cat("Ages present after filtering:\n")
print(table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$development_stage)))
cat("Case/control labels after filtering:\n")
print(table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$case_control), useNA = "ifany"))
cat("Disease group after filtering:\n")
print(table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$disease_group), useNA = "ifany"))
cat("Disease labels after filtering:\n")
print(table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$disease), useNA = "ifany"))
cat("Tissue labels after filtering:\n")
print(table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$tissue), useNA = "ifany"))

```

### QC:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(zellkonverter)

gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood).")
}

gene_names <- rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood)[[gene_col]]
is_ribo <- grepl("^RPL|^RPS", gene_names, ignore.case = FALSE)

assay_to_use <- assayNames(New_ped_healthy_blood)[1]

New_ped_healthy_blood <- addPerCellQCMetrics(
  New_ped_healthy_blood,
  subsets = list(Ribo = is_ribo),
  assay.type = assay_to_use
)

qc <- as.data.frame(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood))
qc$cell_type <- as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood)$cell_type)

keep <- qc$nFeature_RNA >= 200 &
        qc$percent.mt <= 20

New_ped_healthy_blood_qc <- New_ped_healthy_blood[, keep]

celltype_counts <- table(as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)$cell_type))
keep_celltypes <- names(celltype_counts[celltype_counts >= 100])

New_ped_healthy_blood_qc <- New_ped_healthy_blood_qc[
  ,
  as.character(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)$cell_type) %in% keep_celltypes
]

qc_after <- as.data.frame(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))

cat("Counts per cell mostly above 200 genes:",
    sum(qc$nFeature_RNA >= 200), "of", nrow(qc), "cells\n")

cat("Mitochondrial % acceptable (<=20%):",
    sum(qc$percent.mt <= 20), "of", nrow(qc), "cells\n")

cat("Healthy-cell profile present (low mito <=20%, low ribosomal <=30%):",
    sum(qc$percent.mt <= 20 & qc$percent.ribo <= 30, na.rm = TRUE),
    "of", nrow(qc), "cells\n")

cat("Cells with read depth near 8,000-10,000 reads:",
    sum(qc$nCount_RNA >= 8000 & qc$nCount_RNA <= 10000, na.rm = TRUE),
    "of", nrow(qc), "cells\n")

cat("Cells with read depth 4,000-6,000 reads:",
    sum(qc$nCount_RNA >= 4000 & qc$nCount_RNA <= 6000, na.rm = TRUE),
    "of", nrow(qc), "cells\n")

cat("Cell count before QC:", ncol(New_ped_healthy_blood), "\n")
cat("Cell count after QC:", ncol(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc), "\n")
cat("Number of donors after QC:", length(unique(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)$donor_id)), "\n")

cat("Cell types with at least 100 cells after QC:\n")
print(celltype_counts[celltype_counts >= 100])

```

### HEATMAPS:

Simplified, Vertical

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

assay_to_use <- assayNames(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[1]

expr_mat <- assay(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc, assay_to_use)
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))

gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[[gene_col]]
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type
plot_df$donor_id <- meta$donor_id

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte|macrophage", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet|megakaryocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor|progenitor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

class_order <- plot_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(donor_id), donor_id != "") %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n() / length(genes_present),
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(cell_class_label = paste0(cell_class, " (d = ", d, ", n = ", n, ")"))

avg_plot <- plot_long %>%
  group_by(cell_class, gene) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expression = mean(expression, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(class_order[, c("cell_class", "cell_class_label")], by = "cell_class") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class_label = factor(cell_class_label, levels = class_order$cell_class_label),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

ggplot(avg_plot, aes(x = gene, y = cell_class_label, fill = mean_expression)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.4f", mean_expression)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
  low = "#2166AC",
  mid = "#F7F7F7",
  high = "#B2182B",
  midpoint = median(avg_plot$mean_expression, na.rm = TRUE),
  name = "Mean normalized\nexpression"
) +
  labs(
    x = "Gene",
    y = " Cell type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave(
  "New_ped_healthy_blood_qc_heatmap_simplified_vertical.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```

Vertical, non simplified

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

assay_to_use <- assayNames(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[1]

expr_mat <- assay(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc, assay_to_use)
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))

gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[[gene_col]]
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type
plot_df$donor_id <- meta$donor_id

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "")

cell_order <- plot_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(donor_id), donor_id != "") %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n() / length(genes_present),
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(cell_type_label = paste0(cell_type, " (d = ", d, ", n = ", n, ")"))

avg_plot <- plot_long %>%
  group_by(cell_type, gene) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expression = mean(expression, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(cell_order[, c("cell_type", "cell_type_label")], by = "cell_type") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_type_label = factor(cell_type_label, levels = cell_order$cell_type_label),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

ggplot(avg_plot, aes(x = gene, y = cell_type_label, fill = mean_expression)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.4f", mean_expression)), size = 2.7) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
  low = "#2166AC",
  mid = "#F7F7F7",
  high = "#B2182B",
  midpoint = median(avg_plot$mean_expression, na.rm = TRUE),
  name = "Mean normalized\nexpression"
) +
  labs(
    x = "Gene",
    y = " Cell type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
  )

ggsave(
  "New_ped_healthy_blood_qc_heatmap_original_vertical.png",
  width = 9,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300
)
```

Non-simplified, horizontal

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

assay_to_use <- assayNames(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[1]

expr_mat <- assay(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc, assay_to_use)
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))

gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(New_ped_healthy_blood_qc)[[gene_col]]
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type
plot_df$donor_id <- meta$donor_id

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "")

plot_long <- plot_long %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor|progenitor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

class_order <- plot_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(donor_id), donor_id != "") %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n() / length(genes_present),
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(cell_class_label = paste0(cell_class, " (d = ", d, ", n = ", n, ")"))

avg_plot <- plot_long %>%
  group_by(cell_class, gene) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expression = mean(expression, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(class_order[, c("cell_class", "cell_class_label")], by = "cell_class") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class_label = factor(cell_class_label, levels = class_order$cell_class_label),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

ggplot(avg_plot, aes(x = gene, y = cell_class_label, fill = mean_expression)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.4f", mean_expression)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC",
    mid = "#F7F7F7",
    high = "#B2182B",
    midpoint = median(avg_plot$mean_expression, na.rm = TRUE),
    name = "Mean normalized\nexpression"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(
  "New_ped_healthy_blood_qc_heatmap_simplified_vertical_nolabels.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```
